title: Eat
description: Minecraft mod that adds more food
body:
This mod adds more food to minecraft. There's not much new food yet, but I will update this mod and add more food. 

This mod adds these foods:

Ramen (Chicken, Beef)
Golden ramen (crafted with golden soy sauce)
Diamond ramen (crafted with a diamond block and 2 bottles of diamond soy sauce)
French Fries (They don't reduce hunger that much, but you can eat them fast.)
Cut Cooked Beef (It's an ingredient for the beef ramen)
Noodles
Dough (used to make noodles)
Chicken Soup
Carrot cake
Chocolate cake - Gives you speed for 1 minutes

JEI recommended (not required, but the crafting recipes can get confusing)
